page_content: ENMA434 Quantum Mechanics for Engineers (Quantum Mechanics for Engineers) PHYS360 (Introduction to Quantum Mechanics: A Linear Algebra Approach) Core Course (choose one of the following): PHYS467/ Introduction to Quantum Technology ENEE492 ENMA436 Introduction to Quantum Materials and Devices ENME434 Engineering Quantum Systems and Sensors PHYS/ Introduction to Quantum Computing CMSC457 Laboratory Course (choose one of the following): ENEE493 Quantum Hardware Laboratory (Quantum Hardware Laboratory) CMSC437 Introduction to Quantum Software Laboratory (Introduction to Quantum Software Laboratory) Elective Course (choose one of the following): 1 ENEE489 Topics in Electrophysics (ENEE489C Quantum Information Processing) ENEE489 Topics in Electrophysics (ENEE489W Incubating Quantum Leaps) ENMA481 Introduction to Electronic and Optical Materials
